title: /keys list CBOR malformed when buffer fills
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c:646-681 (encode_keys_list_cbor). spec/11-lci.md §17.5.5: GET /keys returns the full key list as valid CBOR. Array header is written with the full count n, but the loop silently breaks when the 512 B buffer fills (~3 entries max at ~160-170 B/entry vs 16-entry store), yielding malformed CBOR (header claims N, body has fewer) — client decode failure. Fix: write array header after computing encodable count, or size the buffer for MAX_ENTRIES and fail loudly.
